description: EC-FEED-017 (editing_session_state_changed must be emitted BEFORE feed_state_changed) has zero automated test coverage. The test explicitly acknowledges this gap with a code comment: 'Emit-order verification note (FIND-S3-006): The editing_session_state_changed emit must occur BEFORE feed_state_changed. This ordering is verified via code review + emit call ordering in feed.rs.' The code IS correctly ordered (feed.rs:263 before :267), but no test would fail if someone reversed the two emit calls.
